Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh", sum(bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * bs.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO') 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/7d551b987d87b09b619b3b3348cfb03be5e5265c736b70b53b0261c9e485f6a1/77daf519-792a-4953-bf0e-62d5e7f9e8de/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
